title: M8 performance regression and readiness matrix
summary: Consolidate M8 UI, i18n, accessibility, content, save, performance and M0-M7 regression evidence into a readiness matrix.
acceptance: Consolidates M8 Product UI, Responsive Layout, Localization, Visual Identity, First Playability and Accessibility gate evidence
Consolidates content, mod, long-save, localization and performance evidence
Runs M0-M7 regression gates including quality, ci:local, m5-invariants, bench and 100000-tick M5 scenario
Records Web demo-only and Windows controlled external test verdict preservation
Separates 1.0 readiness evidence from owner-gated public release actions

history.details: Created by WM-0111 M8 UI/i18n scope amendment DAG; remains proposed until dependencies are done.

forbiddenPaths: apps/** except test-only evidence updates explicitly required by acceptance
packages/** except test-only evidence updates explicitly required by acceptance
